items.title: Best Buy Windows laptop flash sale: HP OmniBook 3 Snapdragon X touchscreen Copilot+ PC hits new all-time low at $500
items.summary: Alongside its now live Father’s Day sale event and as part of its Windows laptops/desktops flash sale, Best Buy has listed HP’s OmniBook 3 Snapdragon X Copilot+ PC in Warm Gold finish for $499.99 shipped. This laptop normally sells for $950, making today’s deal worth $450 in savings and marking a solid 47% discount from its usual going rate. We did see the Glacial Silver variant of this laptop fall to $530 earlier this week, but this latest offer undercuts that price and brings the gold model down to a new all-time low. Head below for a closer look at the specs and everything else this machine brings to the table.

items.title: Heybike offers $200 weekend flash savings on the Villain electric dirt bike to its $1,299 low for third time ever
items.summary: Alongside the flag day flash sale low on Heybike’s Ranger 3.0 Pro e-bike, the brand is also offering a weekend flash sale on its Villain Classic Electric Dirt Bike for $1,299 shipped, with two bundle upgrade kits also at 50% off on the same landing page. One of Heybike’s 2026 releases, it normally fetches $1,499, with discounts usually taking things down to $1,399, though we have seen two previous discounts to $1,299. Now, for the third time since it hit the market, you’re able to score $200 off the tag for the lowest price we have tracked.

items.summary:
RENPHO Smart Scale and Body Tape Measure

Buy for $40 (Reg. $47)

What we love

This time of the year is when I’m most active and outdoors. For this reason, it can be an incredibly satisfying time to keep tabs on shifts in weight loss, muscle gains, and more. This kit covers both with a scale and tape measure, both of which are smart so you can easily keep tabs on overall progress.

items.title: Fanttik’s cordless capsule screwdriver kit with USB-C charging falls to $30 (Reg. $40)
items.summary:
Fanttik S1 Capsule Cordless Screwdriver

Buy for $30 (Reg. $40)

What we love

Screws are used all over the place and manual screwdrivers are far from fun to use. So if you have yet to add some sort of battery-powered solution to your repertoire, here’s a slick option worth a peek. It ditches traditional tool batteries and is topped off via USB-C. Everything fits in a sleek capsule design too.

items.title: Microsoft Project Professional helps keep you on track for $55 ($1,130 value)

If your projects involve multiple people, shifting deadlines, and enough moving parts to make your head spin, Microsoft Project Professional 2024 can help. For a limited time, you can grab a lifetime Windows license for only $54.97 (reg. $1,129.99).

Comprised of aerospace grade 5 titanium, this band delivers high-end materials for a more reasonable price when compared to some of the bigger brands at full price, but today it’s even less. You’re looking at $63 in total, and to my eye it pulls off premium look.
